I cannot generate the requested JSON because the website text provided is for a urology practice, not a TRT clinic. Dr. Luke Machen specializes in urology—specifically vasectomies, ED treatment, penile prosthetics, and male infertility—with no mention of testosterone replacement therapy or any of the services listed in your template (TRT, HRT, BHRT, Peptides, GLP-1, Wellness, Pellets).
